title: ForgeBrain Voice Result
description: The structured output of Voice Generation: rendered narration audio per scene, plus the real measured timing that supersedes the storyboard's word-count estimate. Produced after the Storyboard Generator (see brain/storyboard-spec.md) and consumed by Subtitle Generation and the Renderer. See voice-spec.md for the full process this schema supports.

topic_id.description: Matches the corresponding id in curriculum/java-roadmap.json and the topic_id of the storyboard this audio was generated from.

scenes.description: Per-scene audio results, in the storyboard's scene_order.

total_estimated_duration_seconds.description: Sum of every scene's estimated_duration_seconds, carried from the storyboard's total_duration_seconds.

total_actual_duration_seconds.description: Sum of every scene's actual_duration_seconds, measured from the generated audio.

drift_exceeds_threshold.description: True if total_duration_drift_seconds (or any single scene's drift) exceeds drift_threshold_seconds.

drift_threshold_seconds.description: The drift threshold used to compute drift_exceeds_threshold. A configuration value, not a fixed constant, so it can be tuned per platform or render_style.

audio_format.description: MIME type of the rendered audio files.

sample_rate_hz.description: Audio sample rate, needed by the Renderer to correctly align audio with video frame timing.

voice_version.description: Version of the voice generation process/schema, for future caching and migration.

based_on_storyboard_version.description: The storyboard_version this audio was generated from, for traceability.

voiceProfile.description: Which synthetic voice this result was rendered with. See voice-spec.md Section 6.

voice_id.description: Opaque provider-specific voice identifier (e.g. a Google Cloud Text-to-Speech voice name). Not validated against a fixed enum, since the provider's voice catalog changes independently of this schema.

speaking_rate.description: Relative speaking rate; 1.0 is the provider's normal rate.

pitch.description: Pitch offset in semitones from the voice's default; 0 is unmodified.

scene_id.description: Matches a scene_id from the source storyboard.

audio_file_uri.description: Storage location of this scene's rendered audio (e.g. a Cloud Storage URI). Phase 1 does not resolve or validate real paths.

estimated_duration_seconds.description: Carried unchanged from the storyboard scene's duration.

actual_duration_seconds.description: Measured directly from the generated audio file. This is the timing authority from this stage forward — see voice-spec.md Section 4.

word_timings.description: Word-level alignment within this scene's audio. May be empty if the provider didn't return alignment data for this scene — see voice-spec.md Section 8.

start_time.description: Seconds from the start of this scene's audio, not the full reel.

flagged_uncertainties.description: Drift warnings, suspected mispronunciations, or missing alignment data flagged for reviewer attention.

unresolved_conflicts.description: Reserved for future multi-voice or multi-language conflicts. Empty until relevant.
